calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, March 17, 2016, in Department 525:
Appellant /Plaintiff Yafei Lu, appears as Propria Persona.
Respondent /Defendant Khalid Najib, appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Appellant /Plaintiff, Yafei Lu testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - various exhibits: photos, repair estimates, Defendant's trial brief.

Respondent /Defendant, Khalid Najib testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1)- various exhibits in blue binder: Trial Brief, 3pages Allstate estimate record, auto body & paint receipt, and pictures.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Judgment Entered
